label: CEFR A1-A2
description: Từ vựng tiếng Anh cơ bản theo chuẩn CEFR A1-A2

words.example: He is wearing a white shirt.
words.hint: A piece of clothing for the upper body with a collar

words.example: These pants are too long for me.
words.hint: Clothing that covers each leg separately

words.example: She looks beautiful in that dress.
words.hint: A one-piece garment for women or girls

words.example: I need new shoes for school.
words.hint: You wear these on your feet to walk outside

words.example: Wear a hat when it is sunny.
words.hint: You put this on your head

words.example: I always wear socks with my shoes.
words.hint: Soft clothing you wear on your feet inside shoes

words.example: Take your jacket, it is cold outside.
words.hint: A short coat you wear when it is cold

words.example: She wears a short skirt to the party.
words.hint: Clothing that hangs from the waist, worn by women

words.example: My mother cooks in the kitchen.
words.hint: The room where you cook food

words.example: I sleep in my bedroom every night.
words.hint: The room where you sleep

words.example: I brush my teeth in the bathroom.
words.hint: The room where you take a shower

words.example: There are many flowers in the garden.
words.hint: An outdoor area with plants and flowers

words.example: Please close the door when you leave.
words.hint: You open this to enter a room

words.example: Open the window to get fresh air.
words.hint: You look through this to see outside

words.example: The books are on the table.
words.hint: A flat surface with legs where you eat or work

words.example: Please sit on the chair.
words.hint: A piece of furniture you sit on

words.example: I eat breakfast at seven o'clock.
words.hint: You do this when you are hungry

words.example: I drink water every day.
words.hint: You do this when you are thirsty

words.example: I sleep eight hours every night.
words.hint: You close your eyes and rest at night

words.example: He likes to run in the park.
words.hint: Moving very fast on your feet

words.example: I walk to school every morning.
words.hint: Moving on foot, slower than running

words.example: She likes to read books before bed.
words.hint: You look at words and understand them

words.example: Please write your name on the paper.
words.hint: You use a pen to put words on paper

words.example: The children play in the park after school.
words.hint: You do this for fun

words.example: School starts on Monday.
words.hint: The first day of the work week

words.example: I have English class on Tuesday.
words.hint: The day after Monday

words.example: We play soccer on Wednesday.
words.hint: The middle day of the work week

words.example: The test is on Thursday.
words.hint: The day before Friday

words.example: Friday is my favorite day.
words.hint: The last day of the work week

words.example: I visit my grandparents on Saturday.
words.hint: The first day of the weekend

words.example: We go to the park on Sunday.
words.hint: The last day of the weekend

words.example: I wake up early in the morning.
words.hint: The first part of the day, after you wake up

words.example: I save my money in a piggy bank.
words.hint: You use this to buy things

words.example: There is a small shop near my house.
words.hint: A place where you can buy things

words.example: I want to buy a new book.
words.hint: You give money and get something

words.example: What is the price of this shirt?
words.hint: How much money something costs

words.example: This bag is very cheap.
words.hint: It does not cost a lot of money

words.example: That car is too expensive for me.
words.hint: It costs a lot of money

words.example: My mom goes to the market every morning.
words.hint: A place where many people sell food and goods

words.example: Put the fruit in the bag.
words.hint: You carry things inside this
